description: SYML is the solo venture of artist Brian Fennell. Welsh for “simple”, SYML makes music that taps into the instincts that drive us to places of sanctuary. His self-titled first release, included the multiplatinum song, “Where’s My Love” and the Gold Single fan favourite, “Girl." His sophomore album, The Day My Father Died, was described by NPR as “euphoric,” and featured collaborations with Lucius, Sara Watkins, and Charlotte Lawrence. SYML is also known for his presence across genres, including a feature on Lana Del Rey’s song “Paris, Texas,”, and contributions to songs by the UK-electronic artist George Fitzgerald and Colombian artist Elsa Y Elmar.
title: SYML Concert
